title: Implement user authentication and authorization
summary: Learn how to implement authentication and authorization to resources by using the Microsoft identity platform, Microsoft Authentication Library, shared access signatures, and use Microsoft Graph.

sections.title: Implement user authentication and authorization
sections.summary: Learn how to implement authentication and authorization to resources by using the Microsoft identity platform, Microsoft Authentication Library, shared access signatures, and use Microsoft Graph.

lessons.title: Explore the Microsoft identity platform
lessons.content_md:
Learn the core features and functionality of the Microsoft identity platform including authentication, libraries, and app management tools.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-microsoft-identity-platform/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement user authentication and authorization
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement user authentication and authorization**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
